## ⚙️ How This Works

```text
GitHub Actions (every 6 hours + on every push)
│
▼
scripts/count_repos.py ← GitHub API (public + private count)
│
▼
Updates README.md between marker comments
│
▼
Auto-commits → "🤖 Auto-update: N repos [SNTL84-Bot]"
```

- **Trigger**: Every 6 hours (cron) + every push to `main` + manual dispatch
- **Markers**: `REPO_COUNT_START/END` and `REPO_LIST_START/END`
- **Bot identity**: SNTL84-Bot · 3goldenlotusroots@gmail.com
